pi_items.source: task.json description states 'at least 3 lights' and verifier enforces it
task.json description requires 'Area or Spot lights' and verifier checks it
verifier logic mapping to the 'automotive 3/4 front view' instruction
verifier logic mapping to the 'near black' background instruction
verifier.py size check to ensure non-empty render

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a real, high-quality 3D asset (Mike Pan's BMW benchmark, BMW27.blend) downloaded from the official Blender demo archives. At the start of the task, all existing lights are dynamically stripped via a Python script in setup_task.sh. It has been explicitly verified that the required output paths (studio_setup.blend and product_shot.png), lighting constraints (min 3 Area or Spot lights), camera constraints (height between 0.5m and 3.0m), and environmental lighting (max brightness 0.15 for near-black background) match the task instructions and are properly checked in the verifier and export_result scripts.
